title: Controlify Dungeons
description: Minecraft Dungeons controller buttons for Controlify
body:
# **This resource pack is available on:**
[![с](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e569d1e1692e389f30b75c87cc4a75091079d0d5.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/controlify-dungeons)
[![m](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3256354959623559e62dfea3161df612b5bef929.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/controlify-dungeons)

# Minecraft Dungeons controller buttons for Controlify
**This resource pack changes controller buttons for [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) mod, so it looks like from Minecraft Dungeons**
![xboxonebuttons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/251a5fb2d76a4bc0d9cb6b849fd29a1452c0d64e.png)
![ps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f08eff87c7dd94777e41b6d48d7a61fb368d9da1.png)
![nin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70c8d7f5cd49d2559f4bb10c9f074215d5307ee2.png)
![ps5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26695a02084d83815dc00d213005dce13166a8ea.png)
## Important
**You _NEED_ to have [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) Installed**
